interpretation: The Startup YC tool script transferred positively to one fresh Startup Bench 0-to-1 activation scenario, beating the resilient baseline by +0.0169 while both runs passed constraints.
limits: This is a single-scenario transfer proof, not broad startup mastery.
A 10-scenario compatible-suite probe underperformed the resilient baseline by -0.0151 overall.
The Startup YC script improved cash efficiency and revenue quality but trailed the baseline on product health and strategic coherence.
Next gate should run a multi-scenario Startup Bench suite or Founder Arena transfer.
